summary: Workflow and script both follow bash/YAML best practices throughout: proper error handling, input validation, `set -euo pipefail`, pinned action refs, least-privilege permissions. Well-structured with good separation of concerns (validation → enrichment → output formatting). Minor refinements: complex jq operations (enriched computation ~line 85, status function ~line 71) lack detailed comments explaining logic; script is somewhat monolithic. Good DRY factoring (render_section function). Otherwise solid, production-ready code suitable for shipping.
